description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Princess Margaret Road, Tsim Sha Tsui bound, near Sheung Hing Street
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 公主道，往尖沙咀方向，近常興街

2024-10-07T23:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency road surface repairing works, the slow lane of Princess Margaret Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Sheung Hing Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced train service on National Day and the days before and after
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 國慶日及前後加強列車服務

2024-10-08T06:15:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate passenger travels, MTRCL will enhance the train service during the Chung Yeung Festival long weekend (11 to 13 October) · A more frequent train service will be provided on Island Line and East Rail Line on different dates and times For more information, please browse MTRCL website.
2024-10-08T06:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 港鐵會於重陽節長周末期間（10月11日至13日）加強列車服務，方便大家乘車外出 ·港島綫及東鐵綫於不同日子及時段加密班次 詳情請瀏覽港鐵網⾴。
